{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM name="line_28">
  <DESCRIPTION>5. Bey Herrn Daniel Eckenstein dem Buchdrucker in der Eschemer-Vorstatt sind folgende Bücher zu haben:</DESCRIPTION>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Dr. Johann Rambach</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>erbauliches Hand-Büchlein für Kinder</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Johann Arndt</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>sechs Geistreiche Bücher vom wahren Christenthum</TITLE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>desselben</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Geistreiches Paradies-Gärtlein</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Johann Hübner</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>zweymahl zwey und fünfzig auserlesene Biblische Historien aus dem alten und neuen Testament</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Der Gnaden-Schlüssel aller Kinderen Gottes</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>die Weege und Wercke Gottes in der Seele</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Übungen sich stets in der Gegenwart Gottes zu halten</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration for proper XML formatting. 2. Added root element <ITEM> with name attribute. 3. Added <DESCRIPTION> tag for introductory text. 4. Fixed encoding issues in special characters (e.g., \u221a\u00bacher to Bücher). 5. Properly nested all <BIBL> elements as direct children of <ITEM>. 6. Corrected malformed <BIBL> tags that were incorrectly nested or split. 7. Fixed <FORMAT> tags to use standard abbreviations (e.g., 8vo instead of 8v\u221a\u2264). 8. Ensured all <AUTHOR> and <TITLE> tags are properly closed. 9. Fixed the author name 'Johann-Hübner' to 'Johann Hübner'. 10. Removed redundant 'Item:' text within the content. 11. Standardized the structure of each <BIBL> entry. 12. Ensured all tags are properly opened and closed."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM name="line_28">
  <DESCRIPTION>5. Bey Herrn Daniel Eckenstein dem Buchdrucker in der Eschemer-Vorstatt sind folgende Bücher zu haben:</DESCRIPTION>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Dr. Johann Rambach</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>erbauliches Hand-Büchlein für Kinder</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Johann Arndt</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>sechs Geistreiche Bücher vom wahren Christenthum</TITLE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>desselben</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Geistreiches Paradies-Gärtlein</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Johann Hübner</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>zweymahl zwey und fünfzig auserlesene Biblische Historien aus dem alten und neuen Testament</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Der Gnaden-Schlüssel aller Kinderen Gottes</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>die Weege und Wercke Gottes in der Seele</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Übungen sich stets in der Gegenwart Gottes zu halten</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Added XML declaration for proper XML formatting. 2. Added root element <ITEM> with name attribute. 3. Added <DESCRIPTION> tag for introductory text. 4. Fixed encoding issues in special characters (e.g., \u221a\u00bacher to Bücher). 5. Properly nested all <BIBL> elements as direct children of <ITEM>. 6. Corrected malformed <BIBL> tags that were incorrectly nested or split. 7. Fixed <FORMAT> tags to use standard abbreviations (e.g., 8vo instead of 8v\u221a\u2264). 8. Ensured all <AUTHOR> and <TITLE> tags are properly closed. 9. Fixed the author name 'Johann-Hübner' to 'Johann Hübner'. 10. Removed redundant 'Item:' text within the content. 11. Standardized the structure of each <BIBL> entry. 12. Ensured all tags are properly opened and closed.
